title: memory size is not correct when imported from Verific netlist
code_blocks:
module dut ( 
    input clk 
    ,input ce 
    ,input we 
    ,input [3:0] bwe 
    ,input [5:0] addr 
    ,input [3:0] data 
    ,output reg [3:0] q 
); 

    reg [3:0] mem [0:32] ;
    
    always @ (posedge clk) begin
        if (ce && we) begin
            mem[addr] = (data & bwe) | (mem[addr] & ~bwe); 
        end
        if (!ce) begin
            q <= mem[addr];
        end
    end

endmodule

read_verilog  -nomem2reg primary.sv
hierarchy -check -top dut
proc
opt
write_verilog -noattr rverilog.sv
